calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Guobin Wu present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Bayo Guang.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name to Benny Guobin Wu.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Denied

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Continued To Jul-17-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
